arts.ttl: Arsenal’s six-man striker shortlist revealed: Ranking the Gunners’ best options
arts.sum: This is based on various factors such as potential development, game time, playing style and formation, and provides a Club Fit score. Arteta is known to love signing players with Premier League experience, but while Mbeumo could reach his full potential at the Emirates Stadium, there’s not an awful lot more to like about this move, according to the data analysis experts.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could be handed unexpected Viktor Gyokeres transfer boost as rivals 'explore alternative'
arts.sum: football.london understands Gyokeres is a player the Gunners were interested in earlier this year ahead of the summer transfer window opening, after monitoring the Sweden international during his debut season at Sporting. Chelsea are also reportedly monitoring Delap alongside five to ten other forwards, while United are said to have noted his impact in the Premier League thus far this season.

arts.ttl: Liverpool star break silence after new huge injury blow amid Arsenal Premier League title race
arts.sum: Arsenal will be watching the situation closely ahead of a crucial game between Liverpool and Manchester City this weekend. Liverpool defender Ibrahima Konate has appeared to confirm that he will be on the sidelines for a bit of time, in what is a blow for Liverpool in the Premier League title race.

arts.ttl: Arsenal have one very big Premier League title advantage over Liverpool and Man City this Christmas
arts.sum: It was expected to be something of a transition season for Liverpool, with Jurgen Klopp departing the club after nine years in charge, but Slot has hit the ground running and the Reds have been near faultless, not just in the Premier League but in the Champions League as well. If the Premier League title is to end up in Arsenal's trophy cabinet for the first time since 2004 this season, the Gunners are going to have to produce something of a miraculous comeback.

arts.ttl: Preview: West Ham United v Arsenal
arts.sum: With Liverpool hosting Manchester City the following day, there is an opportunity to move into second spot this weekend or close the gap on the Reds at the summit, but only if we can continue our superb record at the Hammers, where we’ve lost just one of our last 16 Premier League away games. Bukayo Saka has been involved in 21 goals in his last 25 London derby matches in the Premier League (9 goals, 12 assists), including five in his last six against West Ham.
